entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum biocolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for root growth and water uptake

entities.name: FERTILIZER NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen fertilizer applied to sorghum to observe effects on root development and water uptake

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to sorghum to observe effects on root development and water uptake

entities.name: ROOT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of root growth and extension in sorghum

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A deep soil type used in the study conducted in semi-arid tropical India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where the field-grown sorghum study was conducted

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root system, affected by nitrogen and irrigation

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The cumulative length of the root system, higher under dry conditions

entities.name: DRY CONDITIONS
entities.description: Non-irrigated environment where root length and depth were consistently higher

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environment with irrigation where root length and depth were lower

entities.name: MATHEMATICAL MODELING
entities.description: Use of linear, exponential, or logistic curves to describe spatial distribution of root length

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: The length of roots per unit volume of soil, which shifts to deeper layers as the plant grows

entities.name: ROOTING DEPTH
entities.description: The maximum depth reached by the roots, showing a linear relationship with time

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of sorghum up to which rooting depth had a linear relationship with time

entities.name: WATER UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of water absorbed by sorghum, determined by evapotranspiration and soil evaporation

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The total loss of water from the soil and plant, used to determine water uptake

entities.name: SOIL EVAPORATION
entities.description: The loss of water from the soil surface, used to determine water uptake

relationships.description: used to analyze spatial distribution of
